ops.body: Spike-driven requirements for this migration (details on task 36547a8): (1) each consumer README documents the 2-step install — `claude plugin marketplace add yasyf/captain-hook` then `claude plugin install <plugin>@<marketplace>`; (2) upgrade note: existing users must marketplace-add + RE-RUN install (NOT `plugin update`, which silently skips new dependencies); (3) allowCrossMarketplaceDependenciesOn in each consumer marketplace.json is load-bearing — its absence fails open silently; pack lint enforces it.
